summary: Let AI agents run your next deal, fundraise or data room Discussion | Link
content: Papermark is the secure data room built for modern dealmakers. Share confidential documents on a platform that gives you control, visibility, and trust. Build and manage your data room for buy-side deals or raising funds. Papermark's data room can be fully whitelabeled with custom domains, built-in analytics and advanced security controls. Papermark is open-source with hosted and self-hosted options.
chineseSummary: 让 AI 代理运行您的下一笔交易、筹款或数据室 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Papermark 是为现代交易撮合者构建的安全数据室。在为您提供控制、可见性和信任的平台上共享机密文档。建立和管理您的数据室以进行买方交易或筹集资金。 Papermark 的数据室可以通过自定义域、内置分析和高级安全控制进行完全白标。 Papermark 是开源的，具有托管和自托管选项。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
